applied-python-projects.title: Applied Python Projects
applied-python-projects.description: This course helps learners build polished beginner Python projects using classes, objects, tests, debugging techniques, style habits, and capstone planning.
applied-python-projects.moreComingSoon: More Applied Python Projects lessons are coming soon.

python-8-object-oriented-programming.title: Object-Oriented Programming
python-8-object-oriented-programming.description: Introduce classes and objects as a way to model related state and behavior.
why: Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-9-testing-debugging-and-style.title: Testing, Debugging, and Style
python-9-testing-debugging-and-style.description: Help learners verify code behavior, debug systematically, and write readable Python.
why: Builds confidence with testing, debugging, and style.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-10-capstone-automation-project.title: Capstone Automation Project
python-10-capstone-automation-project.description: Guide learners through a complete beginner Python project that combines core skills.
why: Builds confidence with capstone automation project.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

applied-python-projects-python-8-class-b.title: Class Basics
applied-python-projects-python-8-class-b.description: Learn classes and instances, attributes and __init__, methods and self through focused examples and practice.

applied-python-projects-python-8-design-.title: Design With Objects
applied-python-projects-python-8-design-.description: Learn encapsulation and responsibility, lists of objects, class debugging patterns through focused examples and practice.

applied-python-projects-python-8-module-.title: Module Project
applied-python-projects-python-8-module-.description: Learn module 8 class model project through focused examples and practice.

applied-python-projects-python-9-testing.title: Testing Basics
applied-python-projects-python-9-testing.description: Learn writing test cases, assertions and expected results, testing edge cases through focused examples and practice.

applied-python-projects-python-9-debuggi.title: Debugging and Style
applied-python-projects-python-9-debuggi.description: Learn debugging with print and trace, readable python style, refactoring safely through focused examples and practice.

applied-python-projects-python-9-module-.title: Module Project
applied-python-projects-python-9-module-.description: Learn module 9 debug and polish project through focused examples and practice.

applied-python-projects-python-10-projec.title: Project Planning
applied-python-projects-python-10-projec.description: Learn choosing a capstone scope, breaking projects into functions, data model for a small app through focused examples and practice.
bullets: Data Model for a Small App

applied-python-projects-python-10-buildi.title: Building and Polishing
applied-python-projects-python-10-buildi.description: Learn implementing the core loop, testing the capstone, presenting and documenting the project through focused examples and practice.

applied-python-projects-python-10-capsto.title: Final Project
applied-python-projects-python-10-capsto.description: Learn capstone automation project through focused examples and practice.
